MASTER CALENDAR COURT

Notice Of Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jo-Anna Nieves, ESQ., for Plaintiff and moving party.

No other appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFF CACH LLC'S Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted is granted. Request For Monetary Sanctions is denied. Stipulation signed. Order signed in open court. Protem Judge: James Watson.
